/privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy — Ratio
/privacy-policy.description: Learn how Ratio collects, uses, and protects your data. We are committed to ensuring your privacy and maintaining transparency in how your information is handled.
p: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.
We may collect details such as your name, email address, and contact information when you sign up or contact us.
We collect information about how you interact with our platform, including pages visited, time spent, and actions taken.
We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze platform performance.
To provide and improve our services
To analyze usage and optimize performance
Our platform may include links or integrations with third-party services. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:support@closor.com

/.title: Ratio — AI coworker to automate AR
/.description: Ratio is an AI coworker for AR that runs collections, cash applications, deductions and disputes — on top of your ERP and bank.
h1: Your AI coworker to automate AR
h2: Finally, AR software that does the work for you
What you should expect in 60 days
Finally, AR software that does the work for you.
Your next AR hire should be an AI agent
h4: Numbers that collect more cash, faster and cheaper
p: AI agents that run collections, cash applications, deductions and disputes, end-to-end. Sits on top of your existing ERP and bank.
Ratio learns from every customer interaction and gets smarter over time. It personalises every touchpoint, just like your best AR hire would.
Users often receive generic experiences that don’t adapt to their needs, reducing engagement and satisfaction.
“Ratio took a finance ops job that used to take 3 people and ran it cleaner with one. DSO dropped 40% in 8 weeks.”
Mia Patel, CFO, Series B SaaS
Connect your ERP, bank and inbox. Pilot live in one week.
Set credit terms, payment cadence and dispute thresholds. Ratio uses these to run your AR.
Live dashboard shows progress. Ratio escalates only when human judgment is needed.
Insights that let you re-allocate AR headcount to high-judgment work instead of chase-ups.
Slots on top of NetSuite, SAP, Oracle, Sage, Microsoft Dynamics — no rip and replace.
Empower your teams with collaborative tools that improve communication and productivity across departments.
“ The switch to using vertex brought value to the brand insanely. This is good tool to use. ”
A simple and seamless process designed to help you get the most out of our platform quickly.
Combines payment history with pulled credit reports so finance can set smarter terms — and renegotiate when an account trends risky.
SOC 2 ready. Customer data encrypted at rest and in transit, used only to improve your own account.
Unified AR view across collections, cash apply, deductions and disputes.
Ratio surfaces disputes in Slack with full context, drafts the reply, and follows through until the cash is collected.
Live DSO, aging buckets, and cohort recovery rates. Forecast cash collections by week, customer, and product line.
Cuts the long tail of small accounts your team can't afford to chase manually.
Real experiences from developers who’ve tried the tool in their everyday workflow from quick fixes to improving productivity.

This product has significantly improved the way our team works. Everything is well-organized, easy to navigate, and designed with real usability in mind. It helped us reduce confusion, streamline our processes, and stay more focused on what actually matters.

I’m genuinely impressed with how simple yet powerful this platform is. The performance is smooth, the features are practical, and it has saved us a considerable amount of time in our daily operations. It’s one of those tools that just fits perfectly into your workflow.

This has been a reliable and efficient solution for our business. It allowed us to improve productivity, reduce manual work, and manage tasks more effectively without adding unnecessary complexity. Definitely a tool we can depend on long-term.

This platform completely transformed how I manage my work. Everything feels faster, cleaner, and much more intuitive than what I used before. I was impressed by how simple yet powerful the experience is. It saved me so much time and made my daily workflow effortless.

The design is incredibly clean and intuitive, which made onboarding new team members much easier than expected. There’s no steep learning curve, and everything feels thoughtfully structured to enhance the overall user experience.
From branding and interface layout to colors and menus, so Ratio feels like an extension of your brand.
Plug Ratio into the tools you love. Set up automations, sync your data, and make your systems work smarter together.
Pilot was live by week two. Cash apply went from a 3-day backlog to same-day.
8-week pilot. Pick one workflow (collections, cash apply, or deductions). See impact before scaling.
